{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201655511944F6CBB116C50B90F0"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618179271569408793","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不要反应现代的话"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773749209,"group_id":"7614045680625011737","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2FCISStHPr6XBBScmdPwl3EhRnpHUkFJpyhlbN4dtOg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/689cca4a236c47aa9e53e84f9589a9c9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536058&x-signature=ntGfHCw6uYmLf7Ypmqm%2BxSdXJso%3D","user_id":"3452115369336083","user_name":"纳米小灰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3452115369336083","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1700293091,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614045680625011737","book_info":{"abstract":"我，沈砚，濒临停播的说书主播。
激活正史说书系统，开口就有万米天幕，同步投屏华夏历朝历代！
从春秋到大明三千年通史，我一张嘴，历代帝王全破防！
我讲平王东迁，礼崩乐坏，周平王看着东周衰微当场破防，齐桓公拍案定下方略，誓要护下周室江山！
我讲商鞅变法，强秦根基，秦孝公隔着天幕躬身行礼，承诺必保商君周全，车裂惨案永不复现！
我讲楚汉争霸，乌江自刎，项羽看着结局仰天长啸，刘邦沉默良久，终懂英雄相惜！
我讲三国风云，荆州之失，关羽红了眼，诸葛亮提前调整北伐方略，誓要兴复汉室！
我讲盛唐荣光，安史之乱，唐玄宗看着盛世崩塌当场破防，李白杜甫叹一句华夏文脉不朽！
我讲两宋风雨，风波亭冤，岳飞怒发冲冠，赵构浑身颤抖，再不敢动半分害忠良的心思！
我讲大明风华，土木堡之变，朱棣怒拍龙椅，袁崇焕看着结局，终是不负大明不负君！
不讲戏说，不编野史，只讲最真实的华夏正史。
天幕之下，上至九五之尊，下至黎民百姓，全朝代都在蹲守我的说书直播！
千古意难平，今朝皆可平！
